---
agent: agent
description: 'Orchestrates Data/Input collections'
---

## Step 1: Define Terminology

Call the prompt file #file:.github/prompts/apqa_11_terminology.prompt.md and wait for it to complete.

## Step 2: Read Questionnaire

Call the prompt file #file:.github/prompts/apqa_12_questionaire.prompt.md and wait for it to complete. All values loaded from the questionnaire must be remembered before proceeding to any subsequent steps.

## Step 3: Run Script

Call the prompt file #file:.github/prompts/apqa_13_script.prompt.md and wait for it to complete.
